BABA IS YOU - Puzzle Game

Master the art of rule manipulation in this block-pushing puzzle game! Push word blocks to form rules that define the game world. Create statements like "BABA IS YOU" to control your character, "WALL IS STOP" to define obstacles, and "FLAG IS WIN" to set your goal. Break and remake rules to solve increasingly complex puzzles across multiple levels. Transform objects, change win conditions, and discover creative solutions by manipulating the very fabric of reality!

Arrow Keys: Move the player character (or whatever IS YOU) | ESC: Pause/Unpause the game | R: Restart and return to start screen | ENTER: Start the game from start screen
